answers.a: A virtual representation of a physical system
answers.b: A physical duplicate of a machine

explanations.a: Correct. A Digital Twin is a virtual model of a physical asset or process that stays synchronized with real-world data.
explanations.b: Incorrect. It is not a physical copy; it exists digitally.
explanations.c: Incorrect. A storage rack is only one component that may be represented in a Digital Twin.
explanations.d: Incorrect. A robot can be monitored by a Digital Twin but is not itself a Digital Twin.

explanations.a: Incorrect. Industry 4.0 reduces manual intervention through automation.
explanations.b: Correct. Industry 4.0 integrates IoT, AI, automation, and connected manufacturing.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Steam-powered machines belong to the First Industrial Revolution.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Industry 4.0 focuses on digital systems rather than paper records.

questions.question: Which device supplies real-time data to a Digital Twin?

explanations.a: Incorrect. A cable only transmits signals and does not measure data.
explanations.b: Correct. IoT sensors continuously collect and send operational data.
explanations.c: Incorrect. A keyboard is only an input device for users.
explanations.d: Incorrect. A printer produces hard copies and does not collect sensor data.

explanations.a: Correct. It indicates how much of the available storage space is being used.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Battery level is unrelated to storage utilization.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Workforce size does not define storage utilization.

explanations.a: Correct. AGV stands for Automated Guided Vehicle.
explanations.b: Incorrect. This is not the standard industrial term.
explanations.d: Incorrect. This is not used in Industry 4.0.

explanations.b: Correct. When machines stop, production output decreases.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Downtime does not increase storage capacity.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Downtime affects productivity more than just energy use.

explanations.b: Correct. Industrial power consumption is measured in kilowatts (kW).

explanations.a: Correct. It visually highlights areas with different congestion levels.
explanations.b: Incorrect. It is not used for personnel information.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Invoices are unrelated to congestion analysis.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Passwords have no relation to warehouse heatmaps.

explanations.a: Correct. It defines the minimum stock level before replenishment is needed.
explanations.b: Incorrect. AGV speed is controlled separately.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Voltage is an electrical parameter.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Inventory thresholds are unrelated to workforce counting.

questions.question: Main benefit of Digital Twin technology?

explanations.a: Correct. Digital Twins improve monitoring, analysis, and operational optimization.
explanations.b: Incorrect. The goal is digitalization, not more paperwork.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Digital Twins depend on sensor data rather than reducing sensors.
explanations.d: Incorrect. They complement physical factories instead of replacing them.
